This creates look-ahead bias risk for the $10.0B+ market-cap filter.；Using static shares_outstanding across history. This approximates point-in-time market cap and may introduce bias.；Auto-adjusted mixed split pricing for US.IONQ before 2025-01-08 as 2-for-1; post-adjustment split-day return=22.00%.；Auto-adjusted mixed split pricing for US.KLAC before 2026-06-11 as 10-for-1; post-adjustment split-day return=12.92%.；Auto-adjusted mixed split pricing for US.NBIS before 2025-01-27 as 2-for-1; post-adjustment split-day return=25.11%.

生成技术面文章

候选池来自当前页的当前持仓与计划持仓并集，也支持手动输入 ticker。可多选，最多 20 只。文章只基于 Futu OpenAPI 日 K、量价、均线、RSI、MACD、ATR、支撑阻力和历史 K 线形态生成。
已选 0 / 20
也可以手动输入 ticker，支持无市场前缀或完整代码，用空格、逗号或换行分隔。
